name: Sprint League | Brainrot Tsunami
author: Poki
description: Sprint League is the ultimate running game where you’re training to become the fastest person on the planet! Start on a basic treadmill, collect points to advance to better, faster machines, and compete against elite runners to earn coins. Use your rewards to unlock awesome shoes, stylish skins, and powerful upgrades. Climb through levels, boost your abilities, and aim for the top. Inspired by the popular series Squid Game, Sprint League now also contains the red light green light game! Do you have what it takes to reach the highest league in the sprint world? Try now the new Brainrot Tsunami mode! Sprint to collect Brainrots while Escaping a deadly Tsunami. Upgrade your speed, expand your Brainrot Collection, stay focused, and don’t get washed away! Play Tung Tung Tag! It is a fast-paced game of Tag with a twist. In this new game mode you run away from Tung Tung Sahur. While you are running away from him, you have to collect as many coins as you can to win the game. But be careful, if he catches you... You become part of team Tung Tung Sahur! How to play Sprint League? Move with WASD, arrow keys or the joystick. Who created Sprint League? Sprint League is created by OnRush Studio. Play their other games on Poki: Tribals.io , Venge.io , Eat the world , Shipo.io , Arcane Archer , Jungle Friends , Burger Bounty , MagicLand.io , and TexasWorm.io ! How can I play Sprint League for free? You can play Sprint League for free on Poki. Can I play Sprint League on mobile devices and desktop? Sprint League can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
